prompt: Create a realistic, high-detail editorial portrait of an adult woman seated at a small round marble café table in an intimate vintage bar or private club. She has black shoulder-length voluminous wavy bob hair, a poised feminine expression, and warm medium skin. She is wearing an elegant deep burgundy red lace evening dress with sheer long lace sleeves, a scalloped neckline, and a fitted bodice, styled as glamorous nightlife fashion rather than explicit nudity. Her left hand holds a stemmed glass of red wine near the table, with a simple gold ring visible on one finger. The setting is richly atmospheric: dark green walls covered with many framed sepia sketches and portraits, polished dark wood trim, leather seating, antique mirrors and glass cabinets, warm amber lamp light, and a moody upscale old-world interior. Compose the image as a medium close-up portrait from slightly above table height, centered on the woman from head to waist, with the wine glass in the lower left foreground and the background softly detailed. Use cinematic warm lighting, natural skin texture, realistic fabric lace detail, shallow depth of field, 35mm documentary photography feel, subtle film grain, and rich contrast. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no exaggerated anatomy.
